positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic nocturnal forest scene. The main subject is a stylized, glowing fox curled into a protective, vibrant silhouette amidst glowing bioluminescent flora and oversized ferns. The style is modern maximalism meets stained-glass effect, utilizing deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and striking pops of neon magenta and gold accents. Focus on clean linework, high contrast, and geometric patterns within the foliage. Composition must be centered and highly adaptable for apparel printing, ensuring solid color areas for clean cuts. The mood is mysterious, magical, and serene. Cinematic studio lighting, crisp vector graphics quality.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, grainy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, graffiti, logo, trademark, copyrighted character, cinematic photo, realistic, photo-realistic
